request: Show me a dashboard of Germany's orders
search_document:
User Request: Show me a dashboard of Germany's orders

Dashboard Components:
Title: Monthly Revenue
Type: chart
Description: Monthly revenue trend for orders in Germany
Title: Top Products
Type: table
Description: Best-selling products in Germany
Title: Total Orders
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of orders placed in Germany
Title: Order Status Overview
Type: chart
Description: Distribution of order statuses (e.g., shipped, pending) in Germany
Title: Revenue by Region
Type: chart
Description: Revenue breakdown by region within Germany

sql_queries.title: Monthly Revenue
sql_queries.description: Monthly revenue trend for orders in Germany
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID WHERE o.ShipCountry = 'Germany' GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month

sql_queries.title: Top Products
sql_queries.sql: SELECT p.ProductName, SUM(od.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity FROM Orders o JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID WHERE o.ShipCountry = 'Germany' GROUP BY p.ProductID ORDER BY TotalQuantity DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Orders
sql_queries.description: Total number of orders placed in Germany
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalOrders FROM Orders WHERE ShipCountry = 'Germany'

sql_queries.title: Order Status Overview
sql_queries.description: Distribution of order statuses (e.g., shipped, pending) in Germany
sql_queries.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN ShippedDate IS NOT NULL THEN 'Shipped' ELSE 'Pending' END AS OrderStatus, COUNT(*) AS Count FROM Orders WHERE ShipCountry = 'Germany' GROUP BY OrderStatus

sql_queries.title: Revenue by Region
sql_queries.description: Revenue breakdown by region within Germany
sql_queries.sql: SELECT o.ShipRegion, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID WHERE o.ShipCountry = 'Germany' GROUP BY o.ShipRegion ORDER BY Revenue DESC
